title:
公告
NOTICE
content:
HyperCeiler 将于近期推送下一个 release 通道版本。
若您在使用过程中遇到任何问题，请前往 GitHub Issues 或 Telegram 群组进行及时且有效的反馈。

HyperCeiler will soon release the next version of the release channel.
If you encounter any issues during use, please provide timely and effective feedback on GitHub Issues or the Telegram group.
